ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $275 $225 (or best offer) Step back into the late 80s with this original Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet. Released in 1988, this sports title brought the fun of bowling into the arcade scene, complete with competitive play and retro charm. It’s a nostalgic piece for collectors and fans of Capcom’s unique arcade lineup. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $225, or best offer - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

It's been 5 years or so but control panel is excellent overlay, the board was shopped out with the old ram removed and replaced with the industry standard as well as newer style arcade power supply to avoid the original mcr problems. Original stick and buttons. Any questions just ask.

The only thing missing on this is the clear plexiglass over the monitor and bezel, but since it's in my private home collection, it isn't a big deal to me. Game is available for ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. Asking $1,000 OBO and I'm open to trades.

Looks like the Gorf side art is still there but painted over in black. I removed wheel of fortune cpo to reveal the Gorf cpo.

ads.author: Erin Svendsen Meyer
ads.title: Police Trainer Classic Arcade Game
ads.description: Classic Police Trainer Arcade Game with police Vector light bar and strobes in great condition. This is an original Police Trainer arcade machine made in 1997. Everything works great including the blue lights which you can turn on and off independently. Police Trainer is a target shooting simulation game that takes 1 or 2 players through a series of levels created to help develop skills such as accuracy, speed, decision making, etc., as you compete for high scores. This game has been a lot of fun for our family and friends. It is all target shooting so there's no blood or actual violence; rated for mature responsible ages and individuals. This arcade machine is big and very heavy. If you need it delivered, text me and we might be able to work it out depending on delivery location. Dimensions: H=80in, D=40in, W=32in Asking $1500 but will entertain REASONABLE offers. If you lowball, I won't respond. If you have something to trade, text me and let me know. eight four three five one four nine nine seven five

Mostly complete, mostly in good condition. There is some cabinet damage at the lower back rear. This boardset is still in the cabinet, and appears to have never been removed. All screws and cable ties are still in place. Very clean, all original. No mold, no smell, no cigarette burns. Missing the monitor, marquee, foot rest, and some of the joystick handle pieces. Does have the back door, coin box with lid, owners manual and all service and schematics. Overlay is great, side art is good. Unable to test as the monitor is missing. $700 bucks Thanks Also... located in Chattanooga, available for pickup anytime or can help with shipping.
